---
title: "About"
image: hb.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/hannahbarrow
---

Hannah Barrow is a soon to be graduate of Sewanee studying Biology: Ecology and 
Biodiversity. She like whales and butteries and guitars, she even has ceramic 
ornaments of each of those things to prove that they are her favorites. She also 
loves canoeing and climbing and biking and my friends and jelly bean candies. 


Most recently, Hannah has discovered the joy of data storytelling. Ever since 
she learned the magic that you can do with R, she has been wanting to learn how 
to use it and how to tap into this new creative outlet that can also be used 
share messages and stories with others. Now she can...
